title: Beautiful Bracelet
description: Upon pickup, choose [blue]3[/blue] cards in your [gold]Deck[/gold]. [gold]Enchant[/gold] them with [purple]Swift[/purple] [blue]3[/blue].
flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
notes: Upon obtaining this relic, you enter a card selection screen to choose which cards in your deck to apply the Swift enchantment to. The Swift enchantment provides the specified level of enhancement to selected cards.
